style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Nidoqueen's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in her polished steel plates. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through her armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into prismatic shards. Metallic dust particles swirl in slow motion around her, catching the light like liquid mercury. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
